title: Jujutsu Kaisen: Heian Era
description: Jujutsu Kaizen: Heian Era is a hardcore Minecraft modpack set in the golden age of curses, where ancient sorcery, deadly combat, and absolute power define survival.
body:
[Youtub](https://www.youtube.com/@m%C3%B8ulakc)

🩸 Jujutsu Kaizen: Heian Era
"In the age of curses, only strength decides fate."

Welcome to Jujutsu Kaizen: Heian Era, a dark and challenging Minecraft 1.20.1 modpack inspired by the golden age of sorcery from Jujutsu Kaisen. This pack is designed to be immersive, difficult, and progression-focused, recreating a world where cursed energy reigns supreme.

🌑 Everyone Can Become a Sorcerer
Power is not given — it is earned. Every player has the potential to master cursed energy and rise through strength and survival.

Awaken Your Power: Unlock cursed techniques through exploration, combat, and progression.

Master Cursed Energy: Learn to control powerful abilities inspired by domains, techniques, and raw cursed force.

Brutal Combat: Face dangerous cursed spirits and enemies designed to punish mistakes and reward skill.

⚔️ Modpack Features

Jujutsu-Focused Gameplay: Carefully selected mods to deliver an authentic Heian Era curse experience.

Challenging Survival: A harsh world filled with powerful enemies, risky exploration, and meaningful progression.

Performance Optimized: Tweaked configs for smooth gameplay even during intense combat.

Custom Balance: Adjusted loot, difficulty, and progression to fit the dark sorcery theme.

🛠️ How to Begin

Explore: Search the world for cursed artifacts, structures, and powerful foes.

Fight: Use cursed techniques and combat skill to survive.

Ascend: Grow stronger, unlock advanced abilities, and dominate the cursed world.

Developed by MØULAKC Team.
This is the Heian Era — legends are forged through power alone.

🛠️ Private Technical Support
To keep the page clean and spoiler-free, all bug reports are handled privately.

How to report:
Please send a private message/email to: MOULAKC@proton.me

Include:

What you were doing when the issue occurred

Game logs (if applicable)
